rows.label: tev012502_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aha! I believe I've spotted
the rarest of all Miran
creatures—a BLADE with true grit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012502_MSG0002
rows.name:
What do you say, friend? Our team has long
sought out a [ST:gender p1=man p2=woman ]of rare character and spirit,
but with precious little success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012502_MSG0003
rows.name:
However, in you, I believe
we've finally found a candidate
worthy of Team Corondas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012502_MSG0004
rows.name:
Am I mistaken? Are you not worthy
to explore at the side of Corondas,
NLA's most famous adventurer?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012502_MSG0005
rows.name:
Don't tell me you're not intrigued! And should
that intrigue become interest, please feel
free to speak with our captain directly.[ST:wait ]
